log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Kender — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:4+4=8 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 5 falling damage. HP: 173/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.

--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---

→ Kender — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hold Person! [CON save 10 vs DC 12]
Young Red Dragon attacks Kender — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Kender — Bardic Musician HP: 24/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Kender — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 23 damage. Kender — Bardic Musician HP: 1/67
=== ROUND 3 ===

=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
